'''Ryan Clayton''' (born {{birth date|1982|11|22|df=y}}), is an English former professional [[rugby league]] footballer who played in the 2000s and 2010s. He last played for [[Halifax R.L.F.C.|Halifax]] in the [[Co-operative Championship]].

He has previously played for the [[Salford Red Devils|Salford City Reds]], [[Huddersfield Giants]], [[Halifax R.L.F.C.|Halifax]] and [[Castleford Tigers|Castleford]]. Due to injury, Ryan only played in 11-games for Castleford in 2008's [[Super League XIII]]. He was contracted at Castleford for 2009 and was looking to get back in the team for the new season.{{citation needed|date=January 2020}}

Ryan's contract was not renewed at the end of the 2009 season, but Castleford re-signed him on 2 November 2009 for an additional year.{{citation needed|date=January 2020}}

Ryan played for Castleford during 2010 but was released on 14 September 2010.{{citation needed|date=January 2020}}

On 16 October 2010 Ryan joined re-joined former club [[Halifax R.L.F.C.|Halifax]].{{citation needed|date=January 2020}}

Clayton now works for the Canberra Raiders as a Strength & Conditioning and Rehabilitation Coach.{{citation needed|date=July 2024}}
